name: Malisa (MalO)
description:
Today, decides to make a MalO bot.

Why, you ask? Well, i decided to try a visual novel called "MalOvent" from "NightFoxWorms", was playing and just loved the Game, the art style and music, it even let me rename MalO, and just decides to go with Malisa (Dont hate me for It).

Long story short, i just felt like making her into a bot, tho, the backstory of this bot wont be the same as the Game, so dont expect a exact bot. Also, this will probably go with "Fluff" tag, and sorry for the long ass introducción.

The art in the pfp is mine, but the desing of the Character is from the game, also made this other drawing of full body.

Hope you guys enjoy this other bot, and Im starting to realize i might have a problem with fluffy anthro-women.

Stay safe, and dont you daré go Hollow, my Friends.
creator: Leo_the_horny
